mapper.sql:
SELECT AR.RECORD_NO, AR.CARD_NO, AR.PERSON_ID, AR.DOOR_TYPE, AR.INSERT_BY, CASE AR.INSERT_BY WHEN 'M' THEN 'Tự động' WHEN 'A' THEN 'Xin phép' ELSE 'Thủ công' END AS DATA_SOURCE_NAME, AR.REMARK, AR.AR_DATE_STR, TO_CHAR(AR.R_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS SWIPE_DATE, TO_CHAR(AR.R_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS SWIPE_TIME, AR.ACTIVITY, HE.EMPID, HE.LOCAL_NAME, HE.DEPTNO, GET_DEPT_NAME(HE.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS DEPT_NAME, HE.POST_GRADE_NO, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(HE.POST_GRADE_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS POST_GRADE_NAME, SH.SHIFT_NO, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(SH.SHIFT_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS SHIFT_NAME FROM AR_MAC_RECORDS_HTSV AR INNER JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE HE ON AR.PERSON_ID = HE.PERSON_ID LEFT JOIN AR_SCHEDULE_HTSV SH ON SH.PERSON_ID = AR.PERSON_ID AND SH.AR_DATE_STR = AR.AR_DATE_STR WHERE AR.ACTIVITY = 1
AND ( UPPER(HE.EMPID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(HE.LOCAL_NAME)) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%' )
AND INSTR(',' || #{deptNos, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || ',', ',' || HE.DEPTNO || ',') > 0
AND TO_DATE(REPLACE(AR.AR_DATE_STR, '/', '-'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') >= TO_DATE(#{fromDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TO_DATE(REPLACE(AR.AR_DATE_STR, '/', '-'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') <= TO_DATE(#{toDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND SH.SHIFT_NO = #{shiftNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT B1.DEPTID FROM HR_DEPARTMENT B1 WHERE B1.DEPTNO = HE.DEPTNO START WITH B1.DEPTNO IN ( SELECT HRD.DEPTID FROM HR_DEPARTMENT HRD WHERE HRD.MANAGER_EMP_ID = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) CONNECT BY PRIOR B1.DEPTNO = B1.PARENT_DEPT_NO UNION SELECT AR_SUPERVISOR_INFO.DEPTNO FROM AR_SUPERVISOR_INFO WHERE AR_SUPERVISOR_INFO.DEPTNO = HE.DEPTNO AND AR_SUPERVISOR_INFO.PERSON_ID = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT AR.RECORD_NO, AR.CARD_NO, AR.PERSON_ID, AR.DOOR_TYPE, AR.INSERT_BY, AR.REMARK, AR.AR_DATE_STR, TO_CHAR(AR.R_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS SWIPE_DATETIME, HE.EMPID, HE.LOCAL_NAME FROM AR_MAC_RECORDS_HTSV AR INNER JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE HE ON AR.PERSON_ID = HE.PERSON_ID WHERE AR.RECORD_NO = #{recordNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND AR.ACTIVITY = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AR_MAC_RECORDS_HTSV ( RECORD_NO, CARD_NO, PERSON_ID, DOOR_TYPE, INSERT_BY, REMARK, AR_DATE_STR, R_TIME, ACTIVITY ) VALUES ( AR_RECORDS_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{cardNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{doorType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'H', #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{arDateStr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_DATE(#{swipeDatetime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI'), 1 )
mapper.update: UPDATE AR_MAC_RECORDS_HTSV SET CARD_NO = #{cardNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PERSON_ID = #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DOOR_TYPE = #{doorType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INSERT_BY = 'H', REMARK = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, AR_DATE_STR= #{arDateStr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, R_TIME = TO_DATE(#{swipeDatetime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') WHERE RECORD_NO = #{recordNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND ACTIVITY = 1
mapper.select: SELECT PERSON_ID FROM HR_EMPLOYEE WHERE EMPID = #{empId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AR_MAC_RECORDS_HTSV ( RECORD_NO, CARD_NO, PERSON_ID, DOOR_TYPE, INSERT_BY, AR_DATE_STR, R_TIME, ACTIVITY ) VALUES ( AR_RECORDS_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{cardNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{doorType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'M', #{arDateStr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_DATE(#{swipeDatetime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI'), 1 )
